title: Stonemasons
description: Build stone structures, such as piers, walls, and abutments. Lay walks, curbstones, or special types of masonry for vats, tanks, and floors.

tasks.text: Set vertical and horizontal alignment of structures, using plumb bob, gauge line, and level.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Lay out wall patterns or foundations, using straight edge, rule, or staked lines.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Set stone or marble in place, according to layout or pattern.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Remove wedges, fill joints between stones, finish joints between stones, using a trowel, and smooth the mortar to an attractive finish, using a tuck pointer.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean excess mortar or grout from surface of marble, stone, or monument, using sponge, brush, water, or acid.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Shape, trim, face and cut marble or stone preparatory to setting, using power saws, cutting equipment, and hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Mix mortar or grout and pour or spread mortar or grout on marble slabs, stone, or foundation.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Construct and install prefabricated masonry units.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Smooth, polish, and bevel surfaces, using hand tools and power tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Lay brick to build shells of chimneys and smokestacks or to line or reline industrial furnaces, kilns, boilers and similar installations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Replace broken or missing masonry units in walls or floors.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Remove sections of monument from truck bed, and guide stone onto foundation, using skids, hoist, or truck crane.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Drill holes in marble or ornamental stone and anchor brackets in holes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Dig trench for foundation of monument, using pick and shovel.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Repair cracked or chipped areas of stone or marble, using blowtorch and mastic, and remove rough or defective spots from concrete, using power grinder or chisel and hammer.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Position mold along guidelines of wall, press mold in place, and remove mold and paper from wall.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
